ogTitle: Beaconsfield vs Beauty Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beaconsfield and Beauty Point.
heading: Beaconsfield vs Beauty Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beaconsfield, Tasmania and Beauty Point, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaconsfield has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Beauty Point (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beaconsfield or Beauty Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beaconsfield has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Beauty Point scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beaconsfield scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Beauty Point scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beaconsfield or Beauty Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaconsfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
